identity.name: HarvestBid
principles: Fusion: Traditional Farming Aesthetics x High-Speed Auction Data
Emotion: Sunlight, Growth, and Honest Commerce
Clarity: Data (bids/timers) must be instantly readable
Texture: Use grain and paper textures to avoid 'SaaS flatness'

accent.description: Urgent Red - Auction Timers, 'Bid Now' CTAs

background.description: Bone White / Natural Paper - Main Backgrounds

grids.bento_marketing: grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-8 lg:grid-cols-12 gap-4 md:gap-8
grids.auction_list: grid grid-cols-1 sm:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3 xl:grid-cols-4 gap-6

buttons.primary: bg-primary text-primary-foreground hover:bg-primary/90 rounded-full px-8 py-6 text-lg font-medium transition-all shadow-lg hover:shadow-xl hover:-translate-y-0.5
buttons.secondary: bg-secondary text-secondary-foreground hover:bg-secondary/80 rounded-full px-6 py-4 font-medium
buttons.outline: border-2 border-primary text-primary hover:bg-primary hover:text-white rounded-full px-6 py-4 font-medium transition-colors
buttons.destructive: bg-accent text-white hover:bg-accent/90 rounded-full px-6 py-4 shadow-md

cards.auction_card: group relative overflow-hidden rounded-xl bg-white border border-border/40 shadow-sm hover:shadow-md transition-all duration-300
cards.category_card: relative overflow-hidden rounded-2xl aspect-[4/5] group cursor-pointer
cards.feature_card: bg-secondary/30 p-8 rounded-2xl border border-primary/10 hover:border-primary/30 transition-colors

inputs.default: h-12 rounded-lg border-input bg-background px-4 py-2 text-sm ring-offset-background file:border-0 file:bg-transparent file:text-sm file:font-medium placeholder:text-muted-foreground focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-primary focus-visible:ring-offset-2 disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:opacity-50

textures.grain: url("data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg viewBox='0 0 200 200' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%3E%3Cfilter id='noiseFilter'%3E%3CfeTurbulence type='fractalNoise' baseFrequency='0.65' numOctaves='3' stitchTiles='stitch'/%3E%3C/filter%3E%3Crect width='100%25' height='100%25' filter='url(%23noiseFilter)' opacity='0.05'/%3E%3C/svg%3E")

hero.usage: Full width hero background with overlay

categories.name: Grains & Dairy
categories.alt: Sacks of grains and dairy products

general: Use the 'Organic & Earthy' archetype. Avoid generic SaaS blues.
Implement the 'Bento' grid for the landing page categories.
Use 'Playfair Display' for all H1-H3 headings to give a premium/trust feel.
Ensure high contrast for auction timers (Red/Accent) against the white cards.
Use the provided image URLs for the respective sections. DO NOT use placeholders.
For the Auction Detail page, use a split layout: Left = Large Image Gallery, Right = Sticky Bidding Interface.
Real-time elements (bids, timers) must use a Monospace font (JetBrains Mono) for tabular data clarity.

components.AuctionCard: Must include: Image (top), Title (serif), Current Bid (large, bold), Timer (red, mono), 'Bid Now' button (pill shape).
components.HeroSection: Full height (min-h-[80vh]), text-center or left-aligned. Overlay text must be readable (use dark overlay or text-shadow).
components.FilterSidebar: Clean, checkbox-based. Use 'Accent' color for checked states.

universal_guidelines: Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients
Don't make generic centered layouts, simplistic gradients, and uniform styling.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur)
You MUST NOT apply universal transition. Eg: `transition: all`. This results in breaking transforms. Always add transitions for specific interactive elements like button, input excluding transforms
You MUST NOT center align the app container, ie do not add `.App { text-align: center; }` in the css file. This disrupts the human natural reading flow of text
Always use modern button styles like pill-shaped, or sharp button with interaction animations & color relevant to the app style
NEVER: use AI assistant Emoji characters like 🤖🧠💭💡🔮 etc for icons.
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions, parallax effects, and entrance animations. Static = dead.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable. Cramped designs look cheap.
Subtle grain textures, noise overlays, custom cursors, selection states, and loading animations: separates good from extraordinary.
Main agent relies on these image URLs. Missing categories (especially sponsor logos) = main agent will use placeholder text which is FORBIDDEN
Prioritize using pre-existing components from src/components/ui when applicable
Create new components that match the style and conventions of existing components when needed
Examine existing components to understand the project's component patterns before creating new ones
Components MUST use named exports (export const ComponentName = ...)
Pages MUST use default exports (export default function PageName() {...})
Use `sonner` for toasts. Sonner component are located in `/app/src/components/ui/sonner.tsx`
